name: Peach Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, flour, and milk in a bowl. Cook on medium heat until thick, stirring occasionally (or cook in microwave at 50% power).
2. Add mashed peaches, lemon juice, and whipping cream.
3. This makes 2 quarts.
Freezing Instructions:
1. Pour the mixture into an ice cream freezer can.
2. Assemble the freezer by adding layers of ice until it is about 3-inches deep. Sprinkle half a cup of rock salt around the can.
3. Continue layering ice/salt until just above the lid of the can. Do not add too much salt, as it will freeze the edges too quickly.
4. Turn off the machine and let the mixture become stiff.
5. Open the lid carefully to avoid getting salt in the ice cream, then remove the paddle.
6. Cover with Glad Wrap and replace the lid.
7. Insert a cork into the hole in the lid.
8. Pour out some of the water from the hole in the side of the freezer.
9. Remove some ice, add more rock salt, and return the ice to ensure even distribution of salt.
10. Cover the freezer with several layers of newspapers and a heavy blanket.
11. Allow to set for 30-45 minutes before serving.
I prefer Freestone peaches.
